title: FastFox
description:
an optimized Minecraft pack by FurFox.
Fast, smooth, with beautiful visuals and magic.
Maximum performance, zero lag.
body:
# FastFox is an optimized Minecraft pack by FurFox, designed for players who value
# speed, smooth gameplay, and beautiful visuals.

## In FastFox, you’ll find:

**Maximum performance with Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and ImmediatelyFast, keeping your game stable and lag-free**

**High-quality visuals without sacrificing FPS: BetterGrassify, Continuity, LambDynamicLights (optimized for performance)**

**Useful gameplay tools: Xaero’s Minimap, AppleSkin, Jade, spark profiler**

**Balanced experience between performance and aesthetics: beautiful biomes, magical elements, and smooth animations**

**Easy start and comfortable play even on large worlds with many chunks**

## Who is this pack for:

**Players who want a fast Minecraft without micro-stutters**

**Fans of beautiful visuals and magic**

_**FurFox community members who want a smooth and optimized experience**_

Tags: Fast, FPS, Performance, Optimized, Smooth, Magic, Biomes, FurFox
